entity.label: Bezek
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: The place where Saul numbered the forces of Israel and Judah (1 Sam. 11:8); somewhere in the centre of the country, near the Jordan valley. Probably the modern Ibzik, 13 miles north-east of Shechem.

nodes.label: Bezek
nodes.description: The place where Saul numbered the forces of Israel and Judah (1 Sam. 11:8); somewhere in the centre of the country, near the Jordan valley. Probably the modern Ibzik, 13 miles north-east of Shechem.

verses.text: And when he numbered them in Bezek, the children of Israel were three hundred thousand, and the men of Judah thirty thousand.
